subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 20/26] server41tests: test cross-directory rename REMOVE notification

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to the server41tests suite to verify that a cross-directory rename generates a NOTIFY4_REMOVE_ENTRY notification on the source directory's delegation, rather than a NOTIFY4_RENAME_ENTRY. The test creates a file in a delegated directory, renames it to a target directory, and checks for the correct notifications. This ensures compliance with RFC 8881bis Section 27.4.6.
